items.creator: @CryptoHolderLs
items.title:
RT by @MrT57080388: $DEPIN $IOTX 我为什么看好DEPIN赛道与IOTX？
1、从2024年1月1日起到10月14日，在DEPIN SCAN上链接的设备已经从16,251,999台上升12.5%至18,276,436台，DEPIN的整体市值也上升了36.7%，距离今年的高点是下降了41%。
2、就像BTC矿机就是BTC币价的支撑一样，各种物理硬件设备挖矿也是这个赛道的币价支撑，可以预见在未来几个月的牛市行情里，DEPIN板块会迎来爆发与崭新的机会。例如IOTX领投的种子轮项目NETWORK3还未发币但是参与的项目节点已经达到了惊人的35万台。
3、根据DEPINSCAN的统计，未来一年将有38个DEPIN赛道的项目将要发币，而这些项目的背后都是真金白银的物理硬件支撑。
4、IOTX全流通的经济模型，全流通意味着不用担心这轮周期遇到的VC币的超大额解锁，截止当前日期，IOTX的质押率达到了惊人的41%。
5、今年融资5000万美元，老币能够融到比前面几年加起来还多的资本是非常不容易的，说明资本也非常看好DEPIN赛道与IOTX项目，那资本不会做慈善，投入了你猜猜他们怎么快速收回成本？
6、IOTX2.0在7月份升级后，除了DEPIN之外，AI和模块化板块也是可以蹭的，炒作的价值也大大增加。
7、10月末IOID上线后，新的通缩代币经济学也将公布，对于行业来说，也是规范性的革命。
7、对了，一亿的IOTX代币奖励已经在路上了，利好都在路上。

items.creator: @DePINApp
items.title:
RT by @Suzusuzu1965: 🔔 Exciting Update for the DePIN Alliance! 

We’re thrilled to introduce some new features, this is a small part of the big update:

▶️ Connect TON Wallet: Effortlessly link your TON Wallet for a seamless integration with DePIN. Say goodbye to complicated processes—now connecting is simpler than ever.

▶️ Connect EVM Wallet: Easily connect your EVM Wallet (currently supporting Ethereum Mainnet and Arbitrum). This feature helps you manage your assets more efficiently, keeping everything organized in one place.

▶️ One-Time Tasks: Earn extra points and boost your mining power by completing one-time tasks. These quick, substantial rewards can significantly enhance your experience and progress on the platform.

📍 Note: Complete all One-Time Tasks to unlock Partner Tasks.

But that’s not all! We're continuously working to bring you even more ways to engage and earn. 🫡

🚀 In our next update, we’ll be introducing Daily Tasks to keep you active and motivated each day. Stay tuned for more details on how these daily activities can further boost your rewards and mining power!

RT by @Tyron1890: Shieldeum produces Secure Computing Power for 440 million Crypto Users by AI powered Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Network (DePIN). 

The Shieldeum ecosystem contains Datacenter Servers producing Computing Power that enable a suite of advanced services, including application hosting infrastructure, data encryption, threat detection, and high-performance computing tasks protecting Crypto holders and Web3 Enterprises.

Telegram Node Rewards App: https://t.me/ShieldeumBot 
Airdrop: https://app.shieldeum.net/airdrop
